rule: Every module must follow all 14 parameters.

parameters.description: Module files live under /spec/modules/<module_id> and follow required structure.
module.json includes module_id, name, owner, purpose, dependencies and outputs.
feature_request_template.json exists and supports future feature continuity.
bug_fix_template.json exists and requires regression tests.
dependency_map.json defines depends_on, provides_to and blocked_if.
lifecycle_states.json defines entity statuses and transitions.
security.json defines hardening rules, threats and checklist.
access_matrix.json defines role, scope, permission and field restriction rules.
change_control.json defines review, migration and rollback controls.
versioning_policy.json defines major/minor/patch rules and release status.
runbook.md defines build order, stop conditions and continuity rules.
final_modular_design.md explains final architecture and non-negotiable rules.
